evidence_summary: Demonstrate the physical degradation of the protagonists following two weeks of survival and combat before pivoting to a sense of scale through the discovery of the Atmosphere Factory.
After two weeks of survival in the harsh Martian wilderness, battling beasts with Woola's help, John Carter discovers a massive, imposing Atmosphere Factory.
Carter and Woola moving through desolate terrain, visibly worn down.
Characters halted, staring up at the imposing factory structure.
Traversing the wilderness to discover the industrial monolith.
